special.name: 비 갠 후
special.outfit: damp pastel dress, cardigan, wet hair strands,
special.pose: standing, holding closed umbrella, looking up at clearing sky,
special.custom_tags: street, wet pavement, sunlight breaking through clouds, puddles, outdoors,
special._note: 분위기 변주 — 비 갠 후 외부 장면, 청순한 분위기

interaction.name: 소매 잡아당기기
interaction.pose: standing close, small hand gently tugging viewer's sleeve, looking up shyly,
interaction.custom_tags: pov, pov hands, private lounge, warm lighting, indoors,
interaction._note: 고유 인터랙션 — 막내가 '오빠'의 소매를 몰래 당기는 빠져듦 단계 고유 행동

interaction.name: 귓속말로 오빠
interaction.pose: leaning close to viewer's ear, one hand cupped near mouth, tiptoeing slightly,
interaction.custom_tags: pov, close-up, private lounge, dim lighting, indoors,
interaction._note: 고유 인터랙션 — 작은 목소리로 귓가에 '오빠'라 속삭이는 캐릭터 특유 행동

interaction.name: 디저트 먹여주기
interaction.pose: holding small fork with cake piece toward viewer, both hands, leaning forward,
interaction.custom_tags: pov, cafe table, dessert plate, warm lighting, indoors,
interaction._note: 고유 인터랙션 — 직접 만든 디저트를 '오빠'에게 먹여주는 가정적이고 귀여운 고유 행동

interaction.name: 새끼손가락 걸기
interaction.pose: two hands close, only pinky fingers hooked together, both looking down shyly,
interaction.custom_tags: pov, pov hands, garden background, soft daylight, outdoors,
interaction._note: 고유 인터랙션 — 손 전체를 잡지 못하고 새끼손가락만 거는 막내다운 소극적 스킨십 (코어 손잡기와 차별)
